title: Lakeside Blocks
description: City creation helper that adds a bunch of new assets and some very interesting functionalities.
body:
## Lakeside Blocks
This mod is intended to be used in city projects, it brings a handful of new urban related blocks to use in decorative purposes. Furthermore it includes many interesting functionalities such as the pennant tool, editable street signs and trims. 
### Recommendations
I recommend  you use this mod in conjunction with Sodium and Continuity alongside our growing resource pack for more cleaner connected textures.
Resource pack linked with Mod.
Showcase video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6J2Bw3yjhMY&t
### Going Forward
In the future I plan to add a ton more functionalities such as working intersections, powerlines, foliage, randomized foliage, so stay tuned!

_**Any Issues?**_
Please shoot me a dm on Discord at "enolab" if it is pressing :).
